summary: Phase 3 complete, first test run reveals Agent SDK invocation failure — needs debugging

results.description: Phase 3 implementation: dashboard (Express API + React SPA), export CLI, cloud execution (Fly.io), reproduce command, util consolidation, scenario list improvements
Documentation updates: PRD phases marked complete, CODE-REVIEW-FINDINGS updated, Serena memories updated
First benchmark test run: both agent sessions fail immediately with exit code 1, 0 turns, 0 tokens
results.notes: Run 333e7569 completed structurally (scoring, results storage all worked) but Agent SDK sessions fail immediately. Created test-sdk.ts to isolate whether it's SDK/env or harness config. User needs to run: npx tsx test-sdk.ts — if that also fails, issue is SDK/environment (claude CLI not on PATH or version mismatch). If it works, issue is in buildSdkOptions() in src/runner/agent-session.ts (check permissionMode mapping, allowedTools). File test-sdk.ts should be deleted after debugging.
